resourceTemplates.name: youtube-channel
resourceTemplates.title: Get YouTube channel
resourceTemplates.description: Returns comprehensive YouTube channel information using `channelId`, `handle`, or `url`.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-channel-videos
resourceTemplates.title: Get YouTube channel videos
resourceTemplates.description: Returns videos from a YouTube channel using `channelId` or `handle`, with pagination via `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-channel-shorts
resourceTemplates.title: Get YouTube channel shorts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns shorts from a YouTube channel using `channelId` or `handle`, with pagination support via `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-video
resourceTemplates.title: Get YouTube video or short details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed information for a YouTube video or short using `url` or `videoId`.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-video-comments
resourceTemplates.title: Get YouTube video comments
resourceTemplates.description: Returns top-level comments from a YouTube video. Use `continuationToken` to paginate and `order` to control sorting such as `top` or `newest`.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-video-transcript
resourceTemplates.title: Get YouTube video transcript
resourceTemplates.description: Returns transcript data for a YouTube video or short using `url` or `videoId`, with optional `lang` selection when supported.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-search
resourceTemplates.title: Search YouTube
resourceTemplates.description: Searches YouTube for videos, channels, playlists, shorts, lives, and other result types using `query`, optional `type`, and pagination via `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-search-hashtag
resourceTemplates.title: Search YouTube by hashtag
resourceTemplates.description: Searches YouTube results by hashtag and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: youtube-trending-shorts
resourceTemplates.title: Get YouTube trending shorts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns trending YouTube shorts, optionally filtered by `country` when supported.
